requirement_topic.en: Malta EMC Review — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Solar PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 马耳他EMC审查——太阳能光伏逆变器IEC 62920与IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: 馬耳他EMC審查——太陽能光伏逆變器IEC 62920與IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Malta solar PV inverter EMC expectations are aligned to the EU CE framework and typically require evidence traceable to IEC-family standards. In practice, this means preparing IEC 62920 test evidence and applicable IEC 61000-series harmonic, emission, immunity, surge and voltage-sag evidence for the exact inverter model and installation topology. Malta is a 230/400 V, 50 Hz system, so IEC test data generated only for China 220/380 V must be reviewed before submission to the project owner, REWS, or Enemalta interconnection review. Connectors are expected to follow EU Type 2/CCS2 practice where applicable.
summary.zh: 马耳他太阳能光伏逆变器的EMC要求与欧盟CE框架一致，通常要求提交可追溯到IEC体系的证据。实际工作中应准备IEC 62920测试证据及适用的IEC 61000系列谐波、发射、抗扰度、浪涌和电压暂降证据，且必须对应具体逆变器型号和安装拓扑。马耳他是230/400V、50Hz电网，因此仅按中国220/380V生成的IEC测试数据在提交给项目业主、REWS或Enemalta并网审查前应评估其适用性。涉及供电接口时应采用欧盟Type 2/CCS2实践。
summary.zht: 馬耳他太陽能光伏逆變器的EMC要求與歐盟CE框架一致，通常要求提交可追溯到IEC體系的證據。實際工作中應準備IEC 62920測試證據及適用的IEC 61000系列諧波、發射、抗擾度、浪湧和電壓暫降證據，且必須對應具體逆變器型號和安裝拓撲。馬耳他是230/400V、50Hz電網，因此僅按中國220/380V生成的IEC測試數據在提交給項目業主、REWS或Enemalta併網審查前應評估其適用性。涉及供電接口時應採用歐盟Type 2/CCS2實務。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility standards for emission, immunity, harmonic, surge and voltage dip
EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and harmonised standards route used within CE marking
Malta CE-aligned market expectations under national implementation and project-level interconnection documentation

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC reports often rely on GB/T 37408 and domestic EMC test documents from CNAS-accredited bodies. These reports are useful for Chinese domestic certification context, but they do not automatically satisfy Malta interconnection expectations unless mapped to IEC 62920/61000 evidence for Malta conditions. China’s baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz; Malta uses 230/400 V at 50 Hz, so voltage-based EMC margins, harmonic assumptions, and installation conditions can diverge.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408和来自CNAS认可机构的国内EMC测试文件。这些材料对中国国内认证场景有参考价值，但在未将其映射到马耳他IEC 62920/61000证据之前，不会自动满足马耳他要求。中国基准是50Hz、220/380V；马耳他为230/400V，因此EMC裕量、谐波假设和安装条件存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408和來自CNAS認可機構的國內EMC測試文件。這些材料對中國國內認證場景有參考價值，但在未將其映射到馬耳他IEC 62920/61000證據之前，不會自動滿足馬耳他要求。中國基準是50Hz、220/380V；馬耳他為230/400V，因此EMC裕量、諧波假設和安裝條件存在差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
Domestic CNAS-accredited EMC test reports under China grids

gap.en: Gap: Chinese-only EMC reports under GB/T do not satisfy Malta CE-aligned project evidence by themselves. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000-series reports for the exact model or family, confirm harmonic and conducted-emission interpretation for 230/400 V, and provide enclosure, earthing, surge, corrosion-resistance, humidity, ventilation, and coastal derating documentation for Marsaxlokk and other coastal installations.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有GB/T体系的中国EMC报告不能单独满足马耳他CE导向的项目证据要求。出口商应获得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，确认在230/400V条件下的谐波与传导发射结果解释，并补充外壳、接地、浪涌、耐腐蚀性、湿度、通风和沿海降额文件，适用于马耳他Marsaxlokk及其他沿海安装场景。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有GB/T體系的中國EMC報告不能單獨滿足馬耳他CE導向的項目證據要求。出口商應獲得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，確認在230/400V條件下的諧波與傳導發射結果詮釋，並補充外殼、接地、浪湧、耐腐蝕性、濕度、通風和沿海降額文件，適用於馬耳他Marsaxlokk及其他沿海安裝場景。

mandatory_status.target: Required in practice for Malta interconnection and project acceptance documents where REWS, Enemalta or the buyer requires IEC EMC evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T EMC reports are domestic baseline evidence and are not automatically transferable to Malta CE-aligned project review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use Chinese GB/T EMC reports only as background material. For Malta, provide IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series evidence for the exported inverter model, and verify harmonic, surge and EMC assumptions for 230/400 V 50 Hz conditions and coastal deployment before REWS/Enemalta review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T EMC报告仅可作为背景材料使用。对于马耳他，应提交对应出口型号的IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000系列证据，并在提交给REWS/Enemalta审查前核实230/400V 50Hz条件下的谐波、浪涌和EMC假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T EMC報告僅可作為背景材料使用。對於馬耳他，應提交對應出口型號的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列證據，並在提交給REWS/Enemalta審查前核實230/400V 50Hz條件下的諧波、浪湧和EMC假設。
